current_state_summary: Contract actions are split across CCC Front Office and helper surfaces
target_state_summary: One governed contract actions workspace owns the full lifecycle
notes: This is the highest-value surface merge in the rebuild

current_state_summary: Trade builder is powerful but cognitively dense and mixes direct MFL submission with limited offer-response messaging
target_state_summary: Keep the trade workspace but simplify route flow, move lightweight responses to Discord DM, keep acceptance on site, support deferred next-week processing after player kickoff, and keep release-1 execution scoped to two-team trades with commissioner-managed multi-party exceptions
notes: Use progressive disclosure and explicit state transitions; architecture remains multi-party ready, but release 1 is explicitly two-team focused

current_state_summary: Roster entry point is too thin and forces inference
target_state_summary: Replace blank-shell landing with a real roster operations workspace and universal player-action launcher that shows only currently legal actions
notes: Roster page should be the streamlined player-action launch surface with governed ownership preserved underneath and no dead actions shown

current_state_summary: Reports are hash or id routed and optimized for power users
target_state_summary: Retain the suite but route by task and report intent

current_state_summary: Warnings are scattered across modal assistant and inline contexts
target_state_summary: Create one governed guidance and warning system with severity semantics
notes: Must align with warning and block policy matrix

current_state_summary: Worker flows are route-specific and environment-mixed
target_state_summary: Replace with governed workflow and publish service
notes: Environment identity and verification must be explicit

current_state_summary: Refresh logic exists but is tied to legacy worker behavior
target_state_summary: Retain as explicit recalculation job with governed lifecycle
notes: Needs job catalog alignment and verification

current_state_summary: Manual rebuild path mixes prod and test assumptions
target_state_summary: Split into explicit environment-scoped rebuild commands
notes: No mixed env rebuilds survive into UPS_V2

current_state_summary: Message-slot entry is still a compatibility shell concern
target_state_summary: Contain it to a thin shell and keep it out of UPS_V2 IA
notes: Compatibility is allowed only at the edge

current_state_summary: Several external evidence paths were not expanded in Phase 1 by owner choice
target_state_summary: Do not block current planning on skipped evidence-path expansion
